mentions.note: Home building punches above its weight at 10% of economy. Needs lower interest rates to drive more home sales; rising rate expectations hurt outlook.
Down 20% from summer purchase but fundamentals intact; DR Horton call showed home builder strength. Buy dips as rate environment supports sector; Stuart Miller won't let down.
Homebuilder rallying on housing recovery theme; supply normalization bringing prices down to 2019 levels; led group with Toll Brothers.
